Only the warm pipeline (leads 1, 3, 22) remain as active LinkedIn candidates. Their 7-day post-close buffer expired 2026-05-02. IMAP confirms no reply since 2026-04-04 (subject to 31-day gap caveat).

search_queries.name: Claire
search_queries.priority_reason: Strongest warm pipeline lead. Booked a call 2026-04-07, confirmed booking-gap pain. Extra caution — DO NOT reference the call or any prior contact.
search_queries.linkedin_sector_likelihood: high — salons are active on LinkedIn and social media. Post_reference upgrade expected (salons post: wedding hair, prom, bank holiday appointments, team news, before/after, spring colours).
search_queries.fallback_query_1: site:linkedin.com/in hairdresser salon owner director "Leeds" "West Yorkshire"
search_queries.fallback_query_2: site:linkedin.com/in "Westfield Hair & Beauty" owner manager Leeds
search_queries.profile_verification_required: Confirm profile is Claire, owner or manager of Westfield Hair & Beauty in Leeds. Multiple staff profiles may exist — verify role before connecting. Do NOT connect to a junior stylist.
search_queries.do_not_send_if: IMAP reveals ANY email reply since 2026-04-04 — including any follow-up to the call booked 2026-04-07. Any reply cancels LinkedIn permanently for this lead.
search_queries.note_type_on_find: post_reference STRONGLY PREFERRED. Check posts from last 60 days FIRST. If post found: write bespoke note under 200 chars referencing the specific post. If no recent post: use pre-generated generic note from linkedin_connection_notes.json.
search_queries.seasonal_context: May is peak salon season — wedding hair, prom, bank holiday appointments. Pain point (no online booking) is structural and ongoing.

search_queries.name: Rob
search_queries.priority_reason: Highest revenue potential (£550-675 redesign upsell). Upsell signal ('sort the whole thing in one go') was the strongest in the campaign. Late reply is plausible — IMAP check is especially critical.
search_queries.linkedin_sector_likelihood: high — B2B print/design well-represented on LinkedIn for client and supplier relationships.
search_queries.fallback_query_1: site:linkedin.com/in print design owner director "Sowerby Bridge" OR "Halifax" "West Yorkshire"
search_queries.fallback_query_2: site:linkedin.com/in "Pennine Print & Design" print owner manager director
search_queries.profile_verification_required: Confirm profile is Rob, owner or director of Pennine Print & Design in Sowerby Bridge. Do not connect to another Rob in print.
search_queries.do_not_send_if: IMAP reveals ANY email reply since 2026-04-04. Given Rob's upsell signal, a late reply is a genuine risk — treat IMAP as especially critical before any LinkedIn action.
search_queries.note_type_on_find: post_reference if post found within last 60 days. B2B print businesses post about client work, events, weddings, graduations, new print runs. Write bespoke note if post found. If no recent post: use pre-generated generic note.
search_queries.seasonal_context: May is peak print season — weddings, events, graduations. Redesign pain is structural and ongoing.

search_queries.name: Tom
search_queries.priority_reason: Lowest pipeline value (£100-150 quote form) but genuine intent — acknowledged pain unprompted and asked for pricing. LinkedIn is the last channel before archiving.
search_queries.linkedin_sector_likelihood: low — trades rarely active on LinkedIn. Attempt because lead showed genuine intent. Skip if profile cannot be confidently identified.
search_queries.fallback_query_1: site:linkedin.com/in carpentry joinery "Ripon" "North Yorkshire" owner director
search_queries.profile_verification_required: Confirm profile is clearly the owner/operator of Ripon Road Carpentry in Ripon. First name only — extra caution. Do NOT connect to a generic Tom in carpentry elsewhere in Yorkshire.
search_queries.do_not_send_if: IMAP reveals any email reply since 2026-04-04. OR if profile cannot be confidently confirmed as the Ripon Road Carpentry owner.
search_queries.note_type_on_find: post_reference if post found within last 60 days. Write bespoke note. If no recent post: use pre-generated generic note.
search_queries.seasonal_context: May is start of peak carpentry season — garden structures, outdoor projects, extensions. Pain point (no quote form) is structural and ongoing.

08:20 — Write linkedin_profiles.json IMMEDIATELY. Even if no note was sent — write the file with search outcomes. MANDATORY.

08:45-09:25 — fu_041-045 (if IMAP confirms not sent and no reply)
10:00-11:30 — Batch 5 initial sends (if Ryedale data received before 09:30)
EOD — CHANGELOG.md update: ALL actions, ALL outcomes, ALL timestamps
